title: End Semester Examination Schedule Revised
author: Academic Section
summary: Revised end semester examination schedule released.
content: The revised end semester examination schedule has been published on the ERP portal. Students are advised to download the updated timetable and verify the examination dates for all registered courses. Any discrepancy should be reported to the Academic Section within two working days.

title: ERP Maintenance Scheduled This Weekend
author: ERP Cell
summary: ERP services will remain unavailable during scheduled maintenance.
content: The ERP portal will undergo scheduled server maintenance from Saturday 11:00 PM to Sunday 7:00 AM. During this period, course registration, fee payment, grade viewing, and other online services may remain unavailable. Students are requested to plan accordingly.

title: Hall Allotment Schedule Updated for Autumn Semester
author: Dean of Students' Affairs
content: The hall allotment schedule for the Autumn Semester has been updated due to ongoing maintenance in selected hostels. Students should regularly check the ERP portal for allotment status and reporting instructions.

title: Central Library Closed on Sunday
author: Central Library
summary: Library building closed due to polling arrangements.
content: The Central Library will remain closed on Sunday due to polling arrangements for local elections. Digital resources, e-books, and online journals will remain accessible through the library portal. Regular library services will resume on Monday.

title: 72nd Annual Convocation Registration Begins
author: Office of the Registrar
summary: Eligible graduating students may register online.
content: Online registration for the 72nd Annual Convocation is now open. Eligible students are requested to complete registration, verify personal details, and submit gown size preferences before the prescribed deadline. Detailed instructions are available on the institute website.

title: Google India Pre-Placement Talk Registration Open
author: Career Development Centre
summary: Registration through CDC portal is mandatory.
content: Eligible students interested in attending the Google India Pre-Placement Talk must register through the CDC portal. The session will include internship opportunities, hiring process, interview preparation, and an interactive Q&A with recruiters.

title: CGS Weekly GMeeting
author: Computer Graphics Society
summary: Meeting scheduled at CTLVS this Sunday evening.
content: The weekly General Body Meeting of the Computer Graphics Society will be held at CTLVS, Technology Students' Gymkhana. Agenda includes project showcases, recruitment updates, upcoming workshops, and discussion of semester activities. All members are encouraged to attend.

title: Kshitij Recognized Among Asia's Leading Tech Festivals
author: Kshitij Organizing Committee
content: Kshitij, IIT Kharagpur's annual techno-management festival, has received continued international recognition as one of Asia's premier student-led technology festivals. Students interested in joining the organizing team may apply through the official recruitment portal.

title: Research Internship Information Session
author: Office of International Relations
summary: Session on domestic and international research internships.
content: An information session covering research internship opportunities, DAAD, MITACS, and faculty-led summer research programs will be conducted next week. Students from all departments are welcome to participate.

title: Campus Network Upgrade
author: Computer & Informatics Centre
content: Network infrastructure upgrades are scheduled across academic buildings and student halls. Short internet interruptions may occur during the maintenance window. Services are expected to be fully restored after completion of the upgrade.

title: Freshers' Induction Programme Schedule Released
author: Dean of Students' Affairs
content: The induction programme schedule for incoming undergraduate students has been released. The programme includes institute orientation, departmental interaction, hostel briefing, campus tours, and sessions conducted by Technology Students' Gymkhana.

title: Heavy Rainfall Advisory for Campus
author: Institute Administration
summary: Students advised to exercise caution during monsoon.
content: In view of the heavy rainfall forecast, students are advised to avoid unnecessary travel during late evening hours, stay away from waterlogged areas, and follow safety instructions issued by institute authorities. Emergency contact numbers remain active throughout the day.
